## Review checklist

- [ ] The file is located at `agents/<publisher>/<agent>.yaml`.
- [ ] The source commit is a full, immutable Git SHA.
- [ ] The snapshot is config-only and contains no memory.
- [ ] The snapshot contains no secrets, environment values, hooks, or commands.
- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run validate` pass.
- [ ] I understand that merging this pull request publishes or updates the listing.

## Behavioral changes

Describe changes to the system prompt, tools, permissions, response scope, or
runtime behavior. Write `None` only when this is a metadata-only update.
